final_text:
The maximum linear density along [110] suggests a face-centered cubic (FCC) structure, where the [110] direction has the highest atomic density.  
For FCC, the (100) plane has a packing density (planar atomic packing factor) of 0.79.

[ANSWER]C[/ANSWER]
